arts.ttl: Man United star slammed for Ipswich goal as reason for Andre Onana and Patrick Dorgu mix-up clear
arts.sum: Manchester United have got off to yet another disastrous start this time at home to relegation threatened Ipswich Town at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ten Hag slams SOFT Man Utd players after Varane criticism
arts.sum: Ten Hag also discussed his management style and claimed that the current generation of players is a far cry from previous ones - like his own -who had 'thicker skin.' Erik ten Hag claims that the modern generation of footballers can't take criticism after being slammed by former player Raphael Varane.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane trolls James Maddison as Man Utd legend brutally hits back at Tottenham celebration
arts.sum: Maddison aimed a not-so-subtle celebration at Keano after scoring the winning goal against the Red Devils

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim gives Noussair Mazraoui injury update and makes Leny Yoro claim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has made two changes to his starting line-up for Wednesday night's clash with Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Wednesday team news: Haaland starts but no Isak
arts.sum: Gameweek 27 continues with five matches The post Wednesday team news: Haaland starts but no Isak appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim looking to avoid Erik ten Hag Man United mistake that sealed his fate
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has so far refused to change his philosophy at Old Trafford, something which Erik ten Hag chose not to do at M16.

arts.ttl: Team News: Ruben Amorim confirms Man United XI for Ipswich battle with Chido Obi decision made amid goal struggles
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting XI for Wednesday's Premier League clash with Ipswich Town at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Ruben Amorim makes call on star Man Utd are ‘losing patience with’ for Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has confirmed his team for the crucial Premier League fixture with Nottingham Forest as the Red Devils bid to climb the table

arts.ttl: Aston Villa attempt to introduce strict Marcus Rashford 'ban' after move from Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has made an impressive start to life at Aston Villa after joining the Midlands side on loan from Manchester United on deadline day of the January transfer window
